items.name: tick
items.signature: out property <duration> tick:    FluentMotion.tick;     // 16ms — animation frame tick (~60fps)

items.name: quick
items.signature: out property <duration> quick:   FluentMotion.quick;    // 150ms — toggles, micro-transitions

items.name: medium
items.signature: out property <duration> medium:  FluentMotion.medium;   // 200ms — slides, progress bars

items.name: normal
items.signature: out property <duration> normal:  FluentMotion.normal;   // 167ms — standard transitions
